2604.25799.title: At the Edge of the Heart: ULP FPGA-Based CNN for On-Device Cardiac Feature Extraction in Smart Health Sensors for Astronauts
2604.25799.paper_summary: The convergence of accelerating human spaceflight ambitions and critical terrestrial health monitoring demands is driving unprecedented requirements for reliable, real-time feature extraction on extremely resource-constrained wearable health sensors. We present an ultra-low-power (ULP) Field-Programmable Gate Array (FPGA) based solution for real-time Seismocardiography (SCG) feature classification using Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs). Our approach combines quantization-aware training with a systolic-array accelerator to enable efficient integer-only inference on the Lattice iCE40UP5K FPGA, which offers an ideal platform for battery-powered deployments -- particularly in space environments -- thanks to its power efficiency and radiation resilience. The implementation achieves a validation accuracy of 98% while consuming only 8.55 mW, completing inference in 95.5 ms with minimal hardware resources (2,861 LUTs and 7 DSP blocks). These results demonstrate that fully on-device SCG-based cardiac feature extraction is feasible on resource-constrained hardware, enabling energy-efficient, autonomous health monitoring for astronauts in long-duration space missions.
2604.25799.paper_summary_zh: 人類太空飛行雄心的加速與地面健康監測需求的關鍵交匯，驅動著對可靠、實時特徵提取的前所未有的需求，這些需求是在極其資源受限的可穿戴健康傳感器上實現的。我們提出了一種基於超低功耗（ULP）現場可編程門陣列（FPGA）的解決方案，使用卷積神經網絡（CNN）進行實時地震心電圖（SCG）特徵分類。我們的方法結合了量化感知訓練和一個脈動陣列加速器，使得在Lattice iCE40UP5K FPGA上進行高效的整數推理成為可能，該平台非常適合電池供電的應用，特別是在太空環境中，因為其功耗效率和抗輻射能力。該實現達到了98%的驗證準確率，同時僅消耗8.55毫瓦，推理時間為95.5毫秒，並且使用了最少的硬體資源（2,861個查找表和7個數字信號處理塊）。這些結果顯示，完全基於設備的SCG心臟特徵提取在資源受限的硬體上是可行的，從而使得在長期太空任務中為宇航員提供能源高效、自主的健康監測成為可能。
2604.25799.author: Kazi Mohammad Abidur Rahman et.al.
2604.25799.authors: Kazi Mohammad Abidur Rahman, Davis Rakhshan, Philipp Lütke, Laura Harms, Ulf Kulau
